items.claim: Gable Steveson has a 100% finish rate in his professional MMA career.
items.quote: He's 26 years old and has a 100% finish rate.

items.claim: Gable Steveson's defensive awareness is lacking, as evidenced by him getting hit with a spinning wheel kick after being warned to keep his hands up.
items.quote: He just needs to keep his hands up. He was hit with that spinning wheel kick when they told him, 'Keep your hands up. Keep your hands up.' And that spinning wheel kick connected.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker's leg goes out when he is hurt, serving as a visible indicator of his physical state.
items.quote: The thing about Whittaker, guys, is when he's hurt, you can tell he's hurt because his leg goes out.
Krylov has power, but is a bit chinny.
But at the same time, Whittaker is as well.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker is more defensively sound than Nikita Krylov.
items.quote: I think Robert's more defensively sound.

items.claim: The longer the fight goes, the more it favors Bobby Green.
items.quote: the longer this fight goes, the more it's going to favor Bobby Green.

items.claim: Terrance McKinney has a 100% finish rate and has never won a fight by decision.
items.quote: 100% finish rate. Has never won a fight by decision.

items.claim: Lona Kavana's high muscle mass leads to him gassing out quicker.
items.quote: Lona Kavana has a lot of muscle mass, and that can lead to gassing out quicker.

items.claim: Brandon Royval has superior cardio compared to Lona Kavana.
Brandon Royval is susceptible to getting tagged because he consistently engages in firefights.
items.quote: 33 years old, he can get tagged, but it's because he's always in a firefight.
